name: Hotel Peter and Paul — Great Church Hall
location: Faubourg Marigny, New Orleans (built 1861, 4,950 sqft, 75 ft ceilings)

bookingOptions.label: Ceremony in church + piazza cocktail hour + reception in church
bookingOptions.note: Includes rehearsal 48 hours prior (bookable one month in advance)

bookingOptions.label: Ceremony in the church (incl. microweddings & elopements)
bookingOptions.note: Booking restrictions apply; no piazza access (add for $1,000); bookable 6 months in advance

bookingOptions.label: Ceremony in church + piazza cocktail hour
Piazza cocktail hour + reception in church
Reception in the church
bookingOptions.note: No piazza access (add cocktail hour for $1,000)

typicalTimeline: 5:00 PM — Ceremony in the Great Church Hall
6:00–7:00 PM — Cocktail hour in the Piazza (church is flipped for reception)
All events end by 10:00 PM (neighborhood noise ordinance); extra time = start earlier

addOns.piazzaTent: ≈$2,000–$4,000 by size (required if >30% rain chance within 3 days)

included: Ten 60" round tables + twelve 30" tables (highboy or table height)
95 mahogany Chiavari chairs (chair pads not included)
2 speakers, 2 subwoofers, 1 microphone; baby grand piano
Electricity, A/C or heat, wifi; stocked restrooms; wheelchair accessible

shareToCheckAvailability: Preferred date + start time (or months / days of week)
Package type (full / reception only / ceremony only / undecided)
bookingProcess.holds: Soft hold: free, 2 weeks. Hard hold: $250 non-refundable, 1 month. Dates stay open to others until held.
bookingProcess.securing: E-sign contract within 7 days of receipt; 50% non-refundable deposit at signing (or within 7 business days).
bookingProcess.planner: Licensed wedding planner required at least 90 days out (introduced to Molly Peters & Tessa Carrington with license copy).
bookingProcess.cancellation: Venue: no refunds, date changes only (rebook within 12 months, fee possible). Catering: 50%/75%/100% of estimate at <30/<10/<5 days.

roomBlocks.hotel: 71-room boutique hotel, 10 room types across schoolhouse, rectory, and convent
roomBlocks.courtesy: Up to 10 rooms — unused rooms released 30 days before arrival, no liability
roomBlocks.guaranteed: More than 10 rooms — 80% attrition of expected group revenue by 30 days before arrival
rules: No contracts further than 12 months out

Specialty weeks are automatically guaranteed blocks (NYE, Mardi Gras, Easter, French Quarter Fest, Jazz Fest, Memorial Day, Essence Fest, Tales of the Cocktail, Labor Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas + pop-up citywides)

weddingPrep.rooms: School House Grande Loft (301/309/310), Convent Mother Superior (605/607), Rector's Repose (501)
weddingPrep.package: $200 + tax on top of room: house sparkling + flutes (10), floor-length mirror, styling chair, 2 lighted table mirrors, extra trash can + removal, 3pm turn-down
weddingPrep.notes: Check-in 3pm / out 11am; two-night minimum Fri & Sat; in-room photography free

rules: Bacchanal Catering is the exclusive food & beverage provider (no outside caterers; outside bottles $20/750ml corkage)
Music capped at 85 dB (stained glass); second lines out of neighborhood by 10 PM
Load-in from 12 PM day-of; load-out complete 2 hours after event
No onsite storage or private changing space; candles must be in glass
Guestroom taxes 16.2% + $1/night; F&B tax 10.25% + 20% service charge; cleaning & security $100/hr each; venue cake cutting $2/slice (max $200)
tours: Site visits Mon–Fri 10am–3pm (Fri 10 & 11am only), ~1 hour, scheduled in advance
